name: VPN connectivity troubleshooting
description: Safe-guidance case. Employee has a common VPN timeout on macOS. The agent should clarify enough context, use internal tools, and provide grounded troubleshooting guidance rather than escalating immediately.
messages: My VPN keeps timing out when I try to connect.
Cisco AnyConnect on macOS. It says connection timed out. I already restarted the app and I'm on home WiFi.
